revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Fixing the bad interwiki on a template
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
per edit request on talk page - include alt in image link per [[MOS:PDI]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Disputed
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| small = {{{small|}}}
| type  = content
| image = [[File:System-search.svg|45px|link=|alt=]]
| class = ambox-disputed
| issue = This {{{what|article}}}'s '''factual accuracy is [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute|disputed]]'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|{{{details|}}}}}
| talk  = {{{talkpage|{{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{1|Disputed}}}}}}}}}}}}
| fix   = Please help to ensure that disputed statements are [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliably sourced]].
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat   = Accuracy disputes
| all   = All accuracy disputes
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Disputed
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| small = {{{small|}}}
| type  = content
| image = [[File:System-search.svg|45px|link=|alt=]]
| class = ambox-disputed
| issue = This {{{what|article}}}'s '''factual accuracy is [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute|disputed]]'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|{{{details|}}}}}
| talk  = {{{talkpage|{{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{1|Disputed}}}}}}}}}}}}
| fix   = Please help to ensure that disputed statements are [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliably sourced]].
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat   = Accuracy disputes
| all   = All accuracy disputes
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
